title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: At the inaugural Big Technology AI Summit in June 2026, industry leaders including Greg Brockman and Mike Krieger discussed the implications of the federal government's recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. Panelists debated whether the recall represents an effective "AI pause," infrastructure buildout realities, enterprise adoption challenges, and geopolitical competition with China over AI leadership.
writeup: Recorded at the inaugural Big Technology AI Summit in June 2026, this panel discussion features Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie, and others responding to the federal government's recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. The conversation centers on whether that recall functions as an effective AI pause, alongside debates over infrastructure buildout, enterprise adoption hurdles, and AI competition with China. Recurring threads include test-time compute, frontier models, and multi-objective optimization.
